name: Oven-Fried Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Seasoned bread crumbs (Cornflake crumbs or Packaged coating mix)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the chickens and pat them dry.
2. Combine the desired crumb coating with paprika. Coat each piece of chicken with milk, then the crumb mixture.
3. Place the coated chicken pieces in a shallow, heat-resistant, non-metallic baking dish with the larger pieces along the outside edges of the pan and the smaller pieces in the center.
4. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 20 minutes. Rearrange the chicken pieces and heat an additional 10 minutes or until the chicken is fork-tender.
5. Cover the chicken with aluminum foil and let it stand at room temperature for 5 minutes.
6. Serve either hot or cold.
